---
title: "Any way to make yaboot quicker?"
date: 2006-11-23
forum: Apple PPC Users
---

### Post by Najand on 2006-11-23
Hello everyone.

I am using ubuntu on an ibook G4 and everything works just great, except that yaboot is too slow. It takes something like 3~4 Minutes after turning on the computer until the blank screen flashes and the boot selection menu appear.
My /etc/yaboot.conf file is like below:
```

## yaboot.conf generated by the Ubuntu installer
##
## run: "man yaboot.conf" for details. Do not make changes until you have!!
## see also: /usr/share/doc/yaboot/examples for example configurations.
##
## For a dual-boot menu, add one or more of:
## bsd=/dev/hdaX, macos=/dev/hdaY, macosx=/dev/hdaZ

boot=/dev/hda4
device=/pci@f4000000/ata-6@d/disk@0:
partition=5
root=/dev/hda5
timeout=5
install=/usr/lib/yaboot/yaboot
magicboot=/usr/lib/yaboot/ofboot
enablecdboot
macosx=/dev/hda3

image=/boot/vmlinux
        label=Linux
        read-only
        initrd=/boot/initrd.img
        append="quiet splash"

image=/boot/vmlinux.old
        label=old
        read-only
        initrd=/boot/initrd.img.old
        append="quiet splash"


```
Also my "fdisk -l" output is like:
```

/dev/hda
        #                    type name                  length   base      ( size )  system
/dev/hda1     Apple_partition_map Apple                     63 @ 1         ( 31.5k)  Partition map
/dev/hda2         Apple_Bootstrap untitled                1954 @ 52428864  (977.0k)  NewWorld bootblock
/dev/hda3               Apple_HFS Apple_HFS_Untitled_3  52166656 @ 262208    ( 24.9G)  HFS
/dev/hda4         Apple_Bootstrap untitled                1954 @ 52430818  (977.0k)  NewWorld bootblock
/dev/hda5         Apple_UNIX_SVR2 untitled            62078126 @ 52432772  ( 29.6G)  Linux native
/dev/hda6         Apple_UNIX_SVR2 swap                 2699342 @ 114510898 (  1.3G)  Linux swap
/dev/hda7              Apple_Free Extra                 262144 @ 64        (128.0M)  Free space

Block size=512, Number of Blocks=117210240
DeviceType=0x0, DeviceId=0x0


```

Is there any way to make yaboot faster? I appreciate any help in advance.
Thank you very much for reading this.
